trigger.actions_2_targetA: This map is for at least two players.
trigger.actions_3_targetA: You must cooperate with others or you will die!

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Still there is a key in the end of this map.

trigger.actions_1_targetA: KEY: TARANTULA (!! the competition is finished !!)

trigger.actions_3_targetA: The elevator is going down. Heal your teammates before it will crush them.

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Oh no! The ceiling is going down.
trigger.actions_3_targetA: Thanks to slynk for the idea.

trigger.actions_2_targetA: This position is not very pleasant.

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Here are two platforms. On each should be at least one player.
You are so close... Dont die now.

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Just joke. Here are NO more traps.
